heading: Career intermission program adjustment to enhance retention
label: 2740 Career intermission program adjustment to enhance retention
notes: DefinitionsFor definitions of “Secretary” and “Administrator” as used in this section, see , set out as a note under .section 7002 of Pub. L. 118–159section 2651 of this title

children.heading: Authority to extend Federal Employee Health Benefit coverage
children.label: a Authority to extend Federal Employee Health Benefit coverage
children.text: The Secretary and Administrator are authorized to offer employees the option of extending Federal Employee Health Benefit coverage during pre-approved leave without pay for up to 3 years.

children.heading: Responsibility for premium payments
children.label: b Responsibility for premium payments
children.text: If an employee elects to continue coverage pursuant to subsection (a) for longer than 365 days, the employee shall be responsible for 100 percent of the premium (employee share and government share) during such longer period.
